text.tspan: Foreign aid given as grants and concessional loans, DAC countries
Net official development assistance (ODA) in the form of grants and concessional loans. This data is expressed in US dollars and
Note: Net loans are negative when repayments on previous loans are higher than new loans. This data is expressed in constant 2022 US$.
